title: crepis khorassanica
intro: Crepis khorassanica, also known as Khorassan hawk's beard or Khorasan crepis, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Crepis khorassanica include the potential relief from symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, such as bloating and abdominal pain, as well as its possible role in reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
